R0253.title: Decentralized Identity Credential Forgery
R0253.definition: Attackers forge DIDs or verifiable credentials to impersonate users, organizations, or qualifications.
R0253.description: Attackers forge DIDs or verifiable credentials to impersonate users, organizations, or qualifications.
R0253.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
